## Summary

- Describe what changed and why.

## Validation

- [ ] Relevant tests pass locally
- [ ] Manual verification completed for affected flows

## Refactor Guardrails

- [ ] Behavior unchanged for existing user flows (or differences documented and approved)
- [ ] Baseline comparison recorded using `node scripts/capture-refactor-baseline.mjs`
- [ ] Regression tests added or updated to cover changed code paths
- [ ] Transient debug logs introduced during refactor were removed
